case_title: FEKETE, ARPAD VS SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEKETE, ARPAD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO NEWSPAPER AGENCY ATTN ROY J HUBERT-INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS MGR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
